modules.name: Module 1: Preprocessing pipelines, Topic Modeling & NER

topics.title: NLP Foundations
subtopics: Text corpus, documents, tokenizations
Topic Modeling via Latent Dirichlet Allocation (LDA)

topics.title: Text Preprocessing
subtopics: Regex tokenization, stopword removal
Stemming (Porter vs Lancaster) vs Lemmatization POS tags

topics.title: Text Analytics
subtopics: Sentiment Analysis algorithms, lexicon-based vs classification-based

topics.title: Named Entity Recognition (NER)
subtopics: Sequence labeling, transition probabilities, NER modeling frameworks

topics.title: NLP Pipelines
subtopics: Preprocessing, feature extraction, modeling, post-processing, and evaluation metrics

modules.name: Module 2: Vector Space Models, TF-IDF & Language Model Perplexities

topics.title: Text Vectorization
subtopics: Bag of Words (BoW), binary occurrence vectors, N-Grams bounds

topics.title: TF-IDF Mathematics
subtopics: Term Frequency equations, Inverse Document Frequency formulas, scale normalization

topics.title: Semantic Space
subtopics: High-dimensional vector spaces, document similarity, word-co-occurrence matrix calculations

topics.title: Similarity Metrics
subtopics: Cosine Similarity equations, Jaccard Similarity, and Euclidean Distance comparisons

topics.title: Language Modeling
subtopics: N-Gram language models, maximum likelihood estimation, perplexity evaluation equations

modules.name: Module 3: Static Embeddings, Word2Vec & Seq2Seq NLP Networks

topics.title: Word2Vec
subtopics: Continuous Bag of Words (CBOW) vs Skip-Gram architecture details
Hierarchical Softmax, and Negative Sampling math

topics.title: Advanced Static Embeddings
subtopics: GloVe global co-occurrence statistics
FastText subwords arrays, out-of-vocabulary handling

topics.title: NLP Sequence Models
subtopics: Recurrent models (RNN, LSTM, GRU) for text representation
Sequence-to-sequence translations

topics.title: Attention in NLP
subtopics: Scaled Dot-Product Attention in sequence models, alignments math, and context vectors

topics.title: Seq2Seq Translations
subtopics: Search decoders (Greedy vs Beam search widths)
Translation metrics (BLEU, ROUGE)

topics.title: Self-Attention Mechanics
subtopics: Query, Key, Value vectors; self-attention matrix scaling factor (d_k) justification

topics.title: Multi-Head Attention
subtopics: Parallel projection layers, concatenated heads output dimension mappings math

topics.title: Transformer Encoder
subtopics: Layer normalization offsets (Pre-LN vs Post-LN stability)
Feed-forward networks, and Positional Encodings formulas

topics.title: Transformer Decoder
subtopics: Masked self-attention (causal masking)
Cross-attention mappings from encoder outputs

topics.title: Transformer Pre-training
subtopics: BERT Masked Language Modeling (MLM)
Next Sentence Prediction (NSP) objectives
GPT causal language model pre-training

modules.name: Module 5: Fine-Tuning Transformers, Dense Retrieval & Vector DB Search

topics.title: Sentence Embeddings
subtopics: Sentence Transformers, bi-encoders vs cross-encoders, and embedding extract layouts

topics.title: Information Retrieval
subtopics: Sparse retrieval (TF-IDF, BM25 metrics) vs Dense retrieval (vector search maps)

topics.title: Semantic Search
subtopics: Vector indexing algorithms (HNSW, IVF-PQ), cosine search metrics
Reranking models

topics.title: Text Summarization & Q&A
subtopics: Extractive vs abstractive summarizations
Span-prediction architectures for Q&A

topics.title: NLP Applications
subtopics: Topic modeling LDA integration, NER evaluation metrics, and chatbots intent mappings
